title: stachys germanica var. garana
intro: Stachys germanica var. garana, also known as wood betony, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and pink or purple flowers. Wood betony has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. Wood betony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
